examples: Though I love chili and spiciness, I've always struggled with this family of flavors.
Spiciness, after all, is not a flavour, not like sweet or salty or sour.
The alcohol boils away, and the spiciness ought to obliterate any taste of the wine.
Those fruit notes maintain upon first taste and the liquid finishes with a long, composed spiciness.
There was sweetness from the sauces, sour from the lime, saltiness from the fish sauce and spiciness from the chillies.
